# `CloseIRQ`

**Systems:** PX86, M1ARM  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>CloseIRQ();</h3>
<ul>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Closes an IRQ before returning the interrupt. Same usage on C64 and C128,
but different implementations on the various systems.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
interrupt Raster1();
begin
        StartIRQ(@useKernal);

        // Perform some actions

        CloseIRQ();
end;
</code>


</div>
